text: Being here, I feel stimulated by curiosity. The environment is modern, clean, and organized, with an emphasis on research and development—R+D as the wall proclaims. There is a sense of potential and promise, as if I am standing on the threshold of new knowledge or innovation. The presence of fire safety equipment and glass walls makes me aware of structure and security, yet the creative displays inside invite exploration and contemplation on how humans and intelligent machines connect. I feel alert, thoughtful, and slightly excited by the possibilities presented here.
